decoys.category_a: THINGS YOU DO TO SAY GOODBYE
decoys.reason_a: Waving is a common farewell gesture.
decoys.reason_b: Ocean waves are quintessential beach elements that will pull solvers toward grouping it with SAND, TOWEL, and UMBRELLA.

decoys.reason_a: Sand is the defining feature of beaches.
decoys.reason_b: To sand is a woodworking action, tempting solvers to group it with SAW, PLANE, CHISEL, and HAMMER.

other_trick: PLANE tempts toward aviation/travel grouping with CRUISE, and PITT could tempt toward armpit wordplay or Brad Pitt solo rather than the shared first-name pattern with George Clooney, Tom Hanks, and Tom Cruise.

thinking.all_16_words: HUG WAVE NOD KISS UMBRELLA TOWEL SAND COOLER PLANE SAW CHISEL HAMMER CLOONEY HANKS CRUISE PITT
